sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '  1!  a,  b.  '), (2, 'test string 123'), (3, ' '), (4, NULL);
SELECT id, splitByWhitespace(str, 2) AS substrings FROM test_strings HAVING substrings[1] != '';
SELECT id, splitByWhitespace(str, 1) AS substrings FROM test_strings WHERE substrings[1] != splitByWhitespace(str, 0)[1];
SELECT id, count(*) FROM (SELECT splitByWhitespace(str) AS substrings FROM test_strings) GROUP BY substrings HAVING substrings[1] != '';
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, splitByWhitespace(str) AS substrings FROM test_strings) AS temp WHERE id != (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE str IS NULL);
SELECT str FROM test_strings WHERE splitByWhitespace(ifNull(str, 'empty'), 3)[1] != 'empty' AND id != 3;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT num FROM test_numbers WHERE splitByWhitespace(toString(num), 1)[1] != toString(num) AND num != 2;
